data.body: Verified complete (2026-06-15). SSOT extraction landed: search()/_haystack now live in the native reducer package (src/rebar/reducer/search.py) and find_ready_tickets in graph/_ready.py; the hyphenated CLI scripts are thin shims. (Packages were later renamed ticket_reducer->reducer, ticket_graph->graph by downstream refactors, but the extraction is intact.) 164 interface search/ready/parity tests pass; full non-integration suite green (1814 passed, 7 skipped). Closing — verdict-for-close gate not active in this environment.
